title: steris borealis
side_effects: Steris borealis can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and headaches. Prolonged use can lead to more serious complications, including kidney damage and an increased risk of heart arrhythmias. In rare cases, improper use of Steris borealis has been linked to hallucinations, tremors, and even temporary memory loss. If not handled correctly, the plant's active compounds can be toxic, causing these side effects in individuals who are not adequately prepared.
